title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 217.510 - Escape by offender, effect on
text:
217.510.  Escape by offender, effect on. — Escape from custody by any offender subsequent to the execution of a request for final disposition under the provisions of sections 217.490 to 217.520 shall void the request and subject the offender to conviction under sections 217.225 and 217.390 relating to escape from custody.
(L. 1982 H.B. 1196 § 90, A.L. 1989 H.B. 408)
